chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Nazool (Arrival) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> demise

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/193)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/193)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَيْفَ كُنْتُمْ حَيْثُ كُنْتُمْ فِي الْأَظِلَّةِ فَقَالَ يَا مُفَضَّلُ كُنَّا عِنْدَ رَبِّنَا لَيْسَ عِنْدَهُ أَحَدٌ غَيْرُنَا فِي ظُلَّةٍ خَضْرَاءَ نُسَبِّحُهُ وَ نُقَدِّسُهُ وَ نُهَلِّلُهُ وَ نُمَجِّدُهُ وَ مَا مِنْ مَلَكٍ مُقَرَّبٍ وَ لَا ذِي رُوحٍ غَيْرُنَا حَتَّى بَدَا لَهُ فِي خَلْقِ الْأَشْيَاءِ فَخَلَقَ مَا شَاءَ كَيْفَ شَاءَ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ غَيْرِهِمْ ثُمَّ أَنْهَى عِلْمَ ذَلِكَ إِلَيْنَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ali Bin Hammad, from Al Mufazzal who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘How were you<sup>asws</sup> all when you<sup>asws</sup> were in the shadows?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Mufazzal! We<sup>asws</sup> were with of our<sup>asws</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> There wasn’t anyone with Him<sup>azwj</sup> apart from us<sup>asws</sup> in the green shadow. We<sup>asws</sup> praised Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and we<sup>asws</sup> extolled His<sup>azwj</sup> Holiness, and we<sup>asws</sup> extolled His<sup>azwj</sup> Oneness, and we<sup>asws</sup> Praised Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and there was none from an Angel of Proximity nor anyone with a spirit apart from us<sup>asws</sup> until there was a beginning for it in the creation of the things. So He<sup>azwj</sup> Created whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desired from the Angels and others, then the knowledge of that ended up to us<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Muhbub from Salih ibn Sahl from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Certain persons from Quraysh asked the Messenger of Allah, ‘By what means did you excel the prophet while you ended them as the last prophet?” The Messenger of Allah said, “I was the first to believe in my Lord, and the first to answer Allah when He called the prophets to make a covenant and beat testimony against their own souls that had answered positively when asked them, “Am I not your Lord? They all had answered, ‘Yes, You Are our Lord.” I was the prophet that said, “Yes, You Are our Lord.” I, thus, excelled them in the acknowledgment that Allah is the Lord.”
